summary: Tested Personal SMS Mode feature for users without Twilio numbers. All 8 backend tests PASSED. UI verified: orange hint banner visible, 'Sent from your phone' badge shows on sms_personal messages, Switch to Email button works (no regression). Fixed backend to return channel field in thread API.

user_has_no_mvpline_number.details: Test user forest@imosapp.com has no mvpline_number set, activating personal SMS mode

personal_sms_api.details: With channel 'sms_personal', returns status 'sent' without Twilio attempt

personal_sms_logged_in_db.details: Messages with channel 'sms_personal' persisted correctly in messages collection

thread_view_loads.details: Thread view loads correctly with contact name, phone, messages

orange_hint_banner.details: Orange banner 'Messages will copy to clipboard & open your SMS app' visible in SMS mode for users without mvpline_number

sent_from_phone_badge.details: 'Sent from your phone' badge displays on messages with channel 'sms_personal'

sms_mode_banner.details: SMS Mode banner visible at top of thread view

switch_to_email_no_regression.details: Switch to Email button visible and functional (no regression)

regular_sms_channel.details: Regular SMS channel still works for users with Twilio numbers

inbox_page_loads.details: Inbox page loads correctly with no critical JavaScript errors

conversations_api.details: Returns conversations list with contact info

updated_files: /app/backend/routers/messages.py - Added channel, has_media, media_urls to thread API response
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal SMS mode is working. When user has no mvpline_number: 1) Orange hint banner shows in SMS mode, 2) Send button uses 'open-outline' icon instead of 'send', 3) Messages sent with channel 'sms_personal' are logged without Twilio, 4) 'Sent from your phone' badge appears on those messages. Fixed: thread API now returns channel field.

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS - MOCK mode for testing

rca_of_the_issue: Thread API /api/messages/thread/{conversation_id} was not returning the 'channel' field, preventing 'Sent from your phone' badge from displaying. Fixed by adding channel, has_media, media_urls to the response.
